title: integration: rename registry binary
body:
The skopeo_cidev image is updated with the registry binary from the docker-distribution package instead of building one from source.

Ref: https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/410

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

> mkdir /root/.docker: file exists

`s/Mkdir/MkdirAll/` in `openshiftCluster.dockerLogin`, although I am somewhat curious whether this is caused by a change in the images, and if so, what has happened there and why.
I'm sorry, I won't be able to give this a proper review based on my current responsibilities.
